title: Remove Removable Plan References From Shared Core
summary: Rewrites shared core docs, host help, reusable-core boundary language, and companion tests so core no longer treats plan as the default reusable pack.
scope_items: Update shared authored docs and README surfaces under core/docs/** and core/python/src/** to use generic hosted-pack wording where plan is not materially required.
Replace plan-flavored examples in shared host help and parser text with donor-neutral pack examples.
Adjust affected tests and regenerated indexes so the updated shared wording remains validated.
done_when_items: Removable plan-specific wording is gone from shared core docs, host help, and reusable-core boundary messaging.
Remaining plan references in core are limited to current-repo machine authority, generated current-state surfaces, or tests that intentionally prove the live plan-pack contract.
